headline: HP Bets On AI PCs And Security To Reframe Long Term Story
summary: HP (NYSE:HPQ) has announced a broad lineup of new AI focused PCs, printers, security tools, and workflow intelligence software. The portfolio includes quantum resistant security features, TPM Guard, HP IQ, and HP NearSense, aimed at business productivity and hybrid work. HP is also working with partners such as Google to support cross device intelligence and local first AI capabilities. HP shares most recently closed at $19.32, with the stock showing a 4.5% return over the past week and...
